toast_added_to_cart: Product added to cart with your custom design!
intro_made_to_order: Tap a bag style to preview your design on the body. Your personalized piece is crafted to order with the riben.life pattern.
viewer_hint_rotate_zoom: Drag to rotate · Scroll to zoom
viewer_hint_photo_reposition_mode: Use the sliders below · Tap done when finished
front_photo_pan_hint: The 3D preview shows your photo on the bag.
front_photo_reposition_hint_before_move: To shift the photo on the bag, tap Move photo on bag above the preview — sliders will appear right under that button.
front_photo_reposition_intro: Use the horizontal and vertical sliders under the preview buttons. The 3D view updates live. Tap Done on the move button when finished.
front_photo_pan_sliders_descr: 0 is centered. Slide left or right / up or down to shift the print on the bag front.
missing_product_id_warning: Select a product first — product ID is missing.
feature_colors_body: Curated palette plus a custom picker for an exact match.
feature_monogram_body: Up to four characters, size and color you control.
feature_lead_time_body: Made to order — allow several weeks for production and delivery.
intro_product: Preview your bag in 3D. Add a monogram and optional front photo — then add to your bag.
materials_section_simplified: Each piece is made to order with the riben.life pattern and quality construction. You personalize the front with an optional monogram and photo.
material_canvas_body: Durable, everyday texture — a classic foundation for pattern and color.
material_leather_body: Richer surface sheen; develops character with wear.
material_nylon_body: Lightweight and easy to care for — suited to travel.
panel_subtitle: Monogram and front photo — preview updates in real time.
front_photo_scale_link: Shrink or expand photo on bag
front_photo_scale_descr: Adjust the slider; the 3D preview updates as you go.
front_photo_crop_dialog_descr: Drag the frame to choose what gets printed; pull the corners to resize. Cancel closes without changes; Apply replaces your photo with the cropped result.
front_photo_error_size: Image is too large. Use a smaller file.
summary_standard_configuration: Standard bag — add a monogram or front photo to personalize.
save_design_sign_in_hint: to save your design to your account and sync across devices.
